# UX Checklist: Provide Property Value Estimate API Endpoint

**Purpose**: Validate UX for API response inspection and error clarity.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/023-property-estimate-api/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Response Presentation

- [x] CHK-UX-001 Response inspector shows baseline, final estimate, adjustments, and confidence.
- [x] CHK-UX-002 Missing-factor and fallback warnings are visible.
- [x] CHK-UX-003 Correlation ID is displayed with each response.

## Error Presentation

- [x] CHK-UX-004 Error responses show actionable guidance for 400/401/403/422/424/503.

## Consistency & Accessibility

- [x] CHK-UX-005 Labels align with shared naming conventions ("Estimate", "Baseline", "Adjustments", "Confidence", "Warnings").
- [x] CHK-UX-006 Basic accessibility pass (keyboard navigation + contrast) is part of UX gate.
